Finish Cleaning Corrected Data (pulled from Aquarius)

# Set year

```{r}
edi_year <- 2024
```

# Code Starts Here

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(aqsampr)
library(purrr)
set_samples_env(
  server_env = 'AQS_EMPDWQ_SERVER',
  token_env = 'AQS_EMPDWQ_TOKEN'
)

source('00_GlobalFunctions/edi-functions.R')
```

```{r}
# read in data from Aquarius (takes about a minute)

get_year_data <- function(year) {
  map_dfr(1:12, \(m) {
    start <- as.Date(sprintf('%d-%02d-01', year, m))
    end <- ceiling_date(start, 'month') - days(1)

    get_observations(
      startDate = as.character(start),
      endDate = as.character(end)
    )
  })
}

system.time({
  df_year <- get_year_data(edi_year)
})

test <- df_year
```

Filter out un-needed data

```{r}
# filter out replicate/blank data
df_year <- df_year %>%
  filter(qualityControlType == 'NORMAL')

# filter out Churn Bucket/Filter Container data
df_year <- df_year %>%
  filter(!observedProperty %in% c('Churn Bucket ID', 'Filter Container ID'))
```

```{r}
colnames(df_year)
```

```{r}
# format for EDI
df_year <- format_edi(df_year)

# check missing dates
df_year %>%
  filter(is.na(Date))
```

```{r}
unique(df_year$Analyte)
```

## Fix Depths

```{r}
df_year$Sampling_Depth <- as.numeric(df_year$Sampling_Depth)

# no depth for MVI
df_year <- df_year %>%
  mutate(Sampling_Depth = if_else(Analyte == 'MVI', NA, Sampling_Depth))

# fix bottom depths
df_year <- df_year %>%
  mutate(
    Sampling_Depth = case_when(
      str_detect(Analyte, 'Bottom') & Station == 'C10A' & Sampling_Depth < 6 ~ Sampling_Depth + 3, # C10A and Depth < 6: Depth + 3
      str_detect(Analyte, 'Bottom') & Station %in% c('C10A', 'C9', 'C3A') ~ Sampling_Depth, # C3A, C9, C10 & Depth > 6: Depth
      str_detect(Analyte, 'Bottom') ~ Sampling_Depth + 3, # All other stations: Depth + 3
    )
  )
```

# Checks

```{r}
check_analytes(df_year, year = '2024')
```

```{r}
check <- check_duplicates(df_year, year = '2024', return_df = TRUE)
```

# Write file

```{r}
# write_csv(df_final, '01_WaterQuality/edi-annual-updates/data/final/edi_2024_update_QCCodes.csv')
```
